form.formComment: Last start eased back early on finished ninth of 13 runners at Auteuil on March 22 over 3600m, on slow going 22 len behind Vol D'argent carrying 64kg at $26. Before that finished second of 7 runners at Auteuil on February 14 over 3600m, on rain affected going; 12 len behind Glady Tiger carrying 65kg at $4.80. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start pulled up at Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 3650m. The start before that; pulled up at Auteuil on March 1 over 3600m. Unlikely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Last start pulled up at Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 3650m. The start before that; pulled up at Auteuil on March 1 over 3600m. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after four months finished second of 13 starters at this track in the LR on March 11 over 3600m, 1.3 len behind Ci Ppo Ra with 67kg at $14. Previously second-up finished third of 9 runners at Auteuil in the LR on October 23 over 3600m, 9 len behind Lasca De Thaix carrying 65kg at $10. Can find winning form this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished fifth of 9 starters at Auteuil on February 23 over 3500m, in the wet; 10 len behind Tavaco with 65kg at $13. Second run from a spell finished fourth of 11 runners at this track on March 11 over 3450m, 9 len behind Opera Light with 65kg at $15. In the mix.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation 6 of 8 runners at this track in the LR October 25 over 3450m, 34 len behind Metronomique with 64kg at $15. First ever race start 4 of 10 runners at Clairefontaine June 17 over 3400m, slow track; 3 len behind L'ensorcelee with 67kg at $4.80. Returns in tougher company and happy enough to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8.5). Resumes from a spell. form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months won by a head Lyon-Parilly on March 15 over 3400m defeating Joly Moon carrying 66kg at $3.20 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished fourth of 13 runners at Moulins on November 9 over 3500m, on slow going 9 len behind Romana Has with 66kg. Key runner who is expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after four months raced on the pace prior to fading finished fifth of 11 starters at this track on March 11 over 3450m, 11 len behind Opera Light with 65kg at $5.80. Previously second-up finished second of 8 starters at Auteuil on October 7 over 3500m, a long-neck behind Choeur De Grive carrying 69kg at $3.80. Key runner - don't underestimate.
